title: ABS Signal & Idle Up Relay Circuit Check (Cont'd)

figures_detected.description: Diagram showing N-CVT control unit connector (terminal 25) and idle up relay connector (terminal 2) with ohmmeter connected between them
figures_detected.associated_step: Check continuity between N-CVT control unit harness terminal #25 and idle-up relay connector terminal #2

content_blocks.text: ABS Signal & Idle Up Relay Circuit Check (Cont'd)

content_blocks.title: ABS Signal & Idle Up Relay Circuit Check (Cont'd)

nodes.text: Check idle up relay. Refer to "Electrical Component Inspection"

Check continuity
• Disconnect N-CVT control unit connector and remove idle-up relay
• Check continuity between N-CVT control unit harness terminal # 25 and idle-up relay connector terminal # 2
Resistance: 0Ω
Repair harness or connector between N-CVT control unit and idle-up relay

1. Check N-CVT control unit I/O signals
2. Re-check N-CVT control unit pin terminals for damage or incorrect connection of control unit harness connector

items.label: Resistance between N-CVT control unit harness terminal #25 and idle-up relay connector terminal #2
items.condition: Continuity check with N-CVT control unit connector disconnected and idle-up relay removed

model_notes: Applies to N-CVT (continuously variable transmission) equipped vehicles
